title: Instance-ownership substrate selector
description: Formal shape of instance-ownership.yaml — the substrate that carries the DEC-035 instance-ownership marker (DEC-043 D2): `comment` (a label-free append-only event log plus a derived description mirror, the default) or `label` (the DEC-035 `instance:N` label, opt-in where labels are creatable). Resolution/write contract: ADR-041. Deliberately its own home, not a slot in classification.yaml and not substrate-map.yaml (DEC-036 emergent activation). Document-shaped schema: the file IS the resource (no top-level id collection). Companion per COR-018.

binds_to.description: Repo-relative globs matching the adopter-data files this schema validates (COR-023 fallback binding).

substrate.description: Which substrate carries the ownership marker. `comment` (the default the seam applies when this file is absent) is label-free — an append-only event-comment log plus a derived description mirror; `label` opts into the DEC-035 `instance:N` label substrate and is valid only where labels are creatable.
